introSection: Mega Coaster “Four Dimensions” (Japanese: メガコースター「四次元」) is a steel roller coaster located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan. It opened on 19 July 1997.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports. The rings on the heartline roll are red.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Mega Coaster “Four Dimensions” on the parks website (In Japanese)

fullText:
Mega Coaster “Four Dimensions” (Japanese: メガコースター「四次元」) is a steel roller coaster located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan. It opened on 19 July 1997.



Blue track and supports. The rings on the heartline roll are red.




 * Mega Coaster “Four Dimensions” on the parks website (In Japanese)
